rationale: Educ. Code §46.031 merely grants the commissioner general rulemaking authority for the subchapter. The proposed homestead exemption increase does not conflict with this provision; any indirect effects would be addressed through existing rulemaking discretion.
quote: The commissioner may adopt rules for the administration of this subchapter.
_note: No direct conflict. §46.031 is a general rulemaking grant; the proposed Tax Code change does not alter or contradict it.
